name: City of Edgewater Farmers Market

Products.value: Produce (apples, berries, vegetables, herbs), meats (beef, buffalo, lamb, pork, poultry), dairy (cheese, eggs), baked goods, honey, jams, pickles, jerky, sausage

Address.value: Historic West 25th Ave. (between Benton/Chase St. and Ames St.), Edgewater, CO 80214

notes: The on-file website www.edgewaterco.com is not dead but 301-redirects to the real city site www.edgewaterco.gov (still official, City of Edgewater). The city's own event/market subpages (e.g. edgewaterco.gov/living-here/city-events and the GovOffice CMS market page confirmed to exist via search, index.asp?SEC=55860D06-D305-4D15-82DF-6A5F37F368E6&DE=F5403AA4-0A6A-4229-BD60-180D283F3324) consistently returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch (bot protection), so they could not be read directly. Event is branded 'Edgewater Market & Music' by the city (same market as 'City of Edgewater Farmers Market'). Facts above were corroborated across two Colorado Land Conservation Assistance Network (coloradolandcan.org) listings whose contact email (KHardt@EdgewaterCO.com) uses the official city domain, plus a local news article (littletonindependent.net) and a 2026 event listing (calypsoincolor.com search snippet: 'every Thursday from June 21-September 6' 2026), both consistent with June-Sept/Thu 5-8pm. Found an apparently-official Facebook page named exactly for this event (facebook.com/cityofedgewatermarketandmusic) but it is login-walled and its content could not be verified beyond existing/matching the market name. Sources disagreed on phone number across years (720-763-3012, -3058, -3030, and 295-3602 all appeared) so Phone was omitted rather than guessed. The on-file address (2401 Sheridan Blvd., which is Edgewater City Hall) is not where the market is actually held; the market takes place on Historic West 25th Ave, so Address was updated accordingly. No Instagram, ADA accessibility, or Certified Organic status found stated anywhere.
